items.name: GET Request
items.docs: Basic GET request with query parameters

items.name: POST Request
items.docs: POST request with JSON body

items.name: PUT Request
items.docs: PUT request for full resource update

items.name: PATCH Request
items.docs: PATCH request for partial resource update

items.name: DELETE Request
items.docs: DELETE request to remove a resource

items.name: HEAD Request
items.docs: HEAD request - returns headers only, no body

items.name: OPTIONS Request
items.docs: OPTIONS request - returns allowed methods

items.name: Echo (Request Inspector)
items.docs: Echo endpoint - returns all request details (method, headers, body, query, cookies)

items.name: 200 OK
items.docs: Returns 200 OK status

items.name: 201 Created
items.docs: Returns 201 Created status

items.name: 204 No Content
items.docs: Returns 204 No Content - empty response body

items.name: 400 Bad Request
items.docs: Returns 400 Bad Request error

items.name: 401 Unauthorized
items.docs: Returns 401 Unauthorized error

items.name: 403 Forbidden
items.docs: Returns 403 Forbidden error

items.name: 404 Not Found
items.docs: Returns 404 Not Found error

items.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity
items.docs: Returns 422 Unprocessable Entity error

items.name: 429 Too Many Requests
items.docs: Returns 429 Too Many Requests (rate limit)

items.name: 500 Internal Server Error
items.docs: Returns 500 Internal Server Error

items.name: 503 Service Unavailable
items.docs: Returns 503 Service Unavailable

items.name: Basic Auth (Valid)
items.docs: Basic auth with valid credentials (admin:password123)

items.name: Basic Auth (Invalid)
items.docs: Basic auth with invalid credentials - should return 401

items.name: Basic Auth (No Auth)
items.docs: Basic auth without credentials - should return 401 with WWW-Authenticate header

items.name: Login (Get Token)
items.docs: Login to get a bearer token. The post-response script saves the token to accessToken variable.

items.name: Bearer Auth (Protected)
items.docs: Access protected endpoint with bearer token. Run Login first to get a token.

items.name: API Key (Header)
items.docs: API key authentication via X-API-Key header

items.name: API Key (Query Param)
items.docs: API key authentication via query parameter

items.name: API Key (Read Only)
items.docs: API key with read-only permissions

items.name: API Key (Invalid)
items.docs: API key authentication with invalid key - should return 401

items.name: Authorization Code Flow
items.docs: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow - will redirect with code

items.name: Client Credentials Grant
items.docs: OAuth 2.0 client credentials grant - for machine-to-machine auth

items.name: Get User Info
items.docs: Get user info using OAuth token

items.name: JSON Response
items.docs: Returns application/json content

items.name: XML Response
items.docs: Returns application/xml content

items.name: HTML Response
items.docs: Returns text/html content

items.name: Plain Text Response
items.docs: Returns text/plain content

items.name: CSV Response
items.docs: Returns text/csv content

items.name: PNG Image
items.docs: Returns image/png (1x1 red pixel)

items.name: SVG Image
items.docs: Returns image/svg+xml with customizable color and size

items.name: Binary Data
items.docs: Returns application/octet-stream binary data

items.name: Base64 Encoded
items.docs: Returns JSON with base64 encoded data field

items.name: List Users
items.docs: Get all users with pagination, filtering by role, and search

items.name: Get User by ID
items.docs: Get a single user by ID

items.name: Create User
items.docs: Create a new user

items.name: Update User (PUT)
items.docs: Full update of a user

items.name: Update User (PATCH)
items.docs: Partial update of a user

items.name: Delete User
items.docs: Delete a user by ID

items.name: List Posts
items.docs: Get all posts with optional filters

items.name: Get Post by ID
items.docs: Get a single post by ID

items.name: Create Post
items.docs: Create a new post

items.name: Update Post
items.docs: Update a post

items.name: Delete Post
items.docs: Delete a post

items.name: List Post Comments
items.docs: Get all comments for a post

items.name: Create Comment
items.docs: Add a comment to a post

items.name: View Request Headers
items.docs: View all headers received by the server

items.name: Get Custom Response Headers
items.docs: Response includes custom headers like X-Custom-Header, X-Server-Time

items.name: Set Cookie
items.docs: Set a cookie with customizable options

items.name: Get Cookies
items.docs: View all cookies sent with the request

items.name: Set Multiple Cookies
items.docs: Sets multiple cookies in one response

items.name: Delete Cookie
items.docs: Delete a specific cookie

items.name: JSON Body
items.docs: POST request with JSON body

items.name: Form Data (Multipart)
items.docs: POST request with multipart form data

items.name: URL Encoded
items.docs: POST request with URL encoded form data

items.name: Raw Text Body

body.content:
This is raw text content.
Line 2 of the content.
Line 3 with special chars: <>&"

items.docs: POST request with raw text body

items.name: Upload Single File
items.docs: Upload a single file (select file in the form-data body)

items.name: Upload Multiple Files
items.docs: Upload multiple files at once

items.name: Delay 1 Second
items.docs: Response delayed by 1 second

items.name: Delay 5 Seconds
items.docs: Response delayed by 5 seconds (good for testing polling)

items.name: Slow Streaming Response
items.docs: Streams 5 chunks over 5 seconds

items.name: Server-Sent Events
items.docs: Server-sent events stream

items.name: NDJSON Stream
items.docs: Newline-delimited JSON stream

items.name: Create Background Job
items.docs: Creates a job that completes after ~10 seconds. Use polling to check status.

items.name: Check Job Status
items.docs: Poll this endpoint to check job progress (0-100%)

items.name: Valid User Data
items.docs: Valid data - should return 200

items.name: Invalid User Data
items.docs: Invalid data - should return 422 with validation errors

items.name: Single Redirect
items.docs: 302 redirect to /api/methods/get

items.name: Redirect Chain
items.docs: Multiple redirects: /chain -> /step2 -> /step3 -> final response

items.name: Random Error
items.docs: Returns a random error status (400, 401, 403, 404, 500, 503)

items.name: Flaky Endpoint
items.docs: 50% chance of success or failure - good for testing retry logic

items.name: Pre-Request Script
items.docs: Demonstrates pre-request script setting dynamic variables

items.name: Post-Response Script
items.docs: Demonstrates post-response script processing response data

items.name: Chained Request Example
items.docs: Extracts data from response for use in subsequent requests
